textByHash.15cded2045b879cc206ccee7b8bf28a4fccb3b47: At long last, I have been granted freedom. You have done well Bakuna.
textByHash.9df2cf39143207a6f8a7afd3c2f571496121d6d1: Rejoice with me, for your miserable lives are finally at an end!
textByHash.f5bca95844f59ca59b55225b1bc1ed853fe88612: Humans, you have been bestowed with a great honour, for you are about to become the first of your kind in millennia to feed my power!
textByHash.fe6e4fe3c78d5971102eb290d7476f1412ec5e74: Good, for I have one final use of you. My long rest has weakened me, you will grant me strength.
